result.summary: Found 2 notable visual issues on the BetRivers Pennsylvania page: a broken/empty button in the header and obscured legal fine print text.

issues.description: The top-right corner contains a yellow/orange button with no visible text or label. It appears to be a CTA button (likely 'Sign Up' or 'Login') that has failed to render its text content.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the button text is properly loaded and rendered. Check for CSS text color issues (e.g., white text on white/light background) or a failed dynamic content injection.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' sticky overlay button at the bottom of the page overlaps and partially obscures the legal fine print/disclaimer text, making important regulatory information unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding or margin to the fine print section so it is not covered by the sticky 'SCROLL DOWN' button, or reposition the button so it does not overlap legal text.
